creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-07-24 13:03:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases            Makefile 
  Added files:
    databases/mysqltoolkit Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  mysqltoolkit is a collection of command-line utilities that provide missing
  functionality for MySQL. Some of the tools implement lacking server
  functionality, such as online consistency checks for master/slave replication;
  others are client-side utilities such as a query profiler.
  
  WWW:    http://mysqltoolkit.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/114747
  Submitted by:   Steven Kreuzer <skreuzer at exit2shell.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.625     +1 -0      ports/databases/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/databases/mysqltoolkit/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/databases/mysqltoolkit/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/databases/mysqltoolkit/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/databases/mysqltoolkit/pkg-plist (new)
